2279280.name: Eldritch 2
2279280.description:
Minor Key Games' classic horror romp returns in this bigger and better sequel. Eldritch 2 is a first-person stealth action game inspired by immersive sims, roguelikes, and the works of H. P. Lovecraft.

Play It Your Way

Build your preferred loadout of weapons, powers, and perks, as you explore crumbling cities and unearth ancient treasures. Gather resources, research strange artifacts, and unlock permanent upgrades. Sneak, fight, or flee through dark dungeons to stop the Old Ones from returning!

Try, Try Again

In a twist on the roguelike genre, Eldritch 2's randomly generated worlds are seeded and freely replayable. When you die, you can try the same run again; or pick a new random world to explore. The world changes each day... and some secrets may only be revealed when the stars align.

Worlds Old and New

Visit classic Lovecraftian locales, from Innsmouth to R'lyeh to the Dreamlands. Mingle with the locals, and trade for supplies before exploring the depths. No longer limited to claustrophobic dungeons, Eldritch 2's improved engine seamlessly spans large indoor and outdoor environments.
